name: activate_esim
description: Activate eSIM for a verified subscriber using an EID.

examples.instruction: Example request for activate_esim.

name: add_data_package
description: Add a one-time data package to an active subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for add_data_package.

name: apply_late_fee_waiver
description: Apply a one-time late fee waiver for an eligible customer.

examples.instruction: Example request for apply_late_fee_waiver.

name: block_premium_sms
description: Block premium SMS services for a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for block_premium_sms.

name: change_plan
description: Move an active subscriber to a new mobile plan.

examples.instruction: Example request for change_plan.

name: check_network_status
description: Return network incident status for an area.

examples.instruction: Example request for check_network_status.

name: disable_roaming
description: Disable international roaming for a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for disable_roaming.

name: enable_roaming
description: Enable international roaming for an eligible subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for enable_roaming.

name: get_balance
description: Return current balance and outstanding charges for a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for get_balance.

name: get_current_plan
description: Return the active mobile plan for a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for get_current_plan.

name: get_customer_profile
description: Return non-sensitive customer profile fields.

examples.instruction: Example request for get_customer_profile.

name: get_usage
description: Return current data and voice usage for a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for get_usage.

name: list_available_plans
description: List currently available telco plans.

examples.instruction: Example request for list_available_plans.

name: open_support_ticket
description: Open a support ticket for a customer issue.

examples.instruction: Example request for open_support_ticket.

name: pay_bill
description: Record a customer bill payment.

examples.instruction: Example request for pay_bill.

name: register_autopay
description: Register autopay for a postpaid customer.

examples.instruction: Example request for register_autopay.

name: replace_sim
description: Queue a SIM replacement request.

examples.instruction: Example request for replace_sim.

name: report_lost_sim
description: Record a lost SIM report for a verified subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for report_lost_sim.

name: resume_line
description: Reactivate a suspended subscriber line.

examples.instruction: Example request for resume_line.

name: send_otp
description: Send a one-time password to verify a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for send_otp.

name: set_spending_limit
description: Set a spending limit for a subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for set_spending_limit.

name: suspend_line
description: Temporarily suspend an active subscriber line.

examples.instruction: Example request for suspend_line.

name: unblock_premium_sms
description: Unblock premium SMS services after verification.

examples.instruction: Example request for unblock_premium_sms.

name: update_billing_email
description: Update the billing email address for a verified subscriber.

examples.instruction: Example request for update_billing_email.

name: verify_otp
description: Verify an OTP submitted by the customer.

examples.instruction: Example request for verify_otp.

name: cancel_subscription
description: Cancel an active subscription after all charges are cleared.

examples.instruction: Example request for cancel_subscription.

name: increase_credit_limit
description: Increase a postpaid customer's credit limit.

examples.instruction: Example request for increase_credit_limit.

name: remove_autopay
description: Remove autopay from a customer account.

examples.instruction: Example request for remove_autopay.

name: transfer_ownership
description: Transfer subscriber ownership to another verified customer.

examples.instruction: Example request for transfer_ownership.

name: legacy_change_plan
description: Deprecated plan-change endpoint.

examples.instruction: Example request for legacy_change_plan.

name: legacy_enable_roaming
description: Deprecated roaming activation endpoint.

examples.instruction: Example request for legacy_enable_roaming.

name: close_support_ticket
description: Close an existing support ticket.

examples.instruction: Example request for close_support_ticket.
